name: Nooks AI Sales Dialer API
what_it_does: AI-powered sales dialer and virtual selling platform with API — combining parallel dialing with AI call coaching (real-time suggestions during calls), virtual sales floor for remote team collaboration, call recording analysis, automated call scoring, and CRM activity sync for SDR teams.
use_cases: Querying call session metrics and AI coaching scores for SDR performance reviews
Integrating Nooks call activity with Salesforce for complete pipeline activity logging
Pulling call recording analysis and talk-track effectiveness data for coaching
Monitoring team virtual sales floor activity for remote sales manager oversight
Triggering call campaigns from CRM prospect lists via API integration
not_for: Inbound call center management (use Five9 or Talkdesk)
Customer support voice interactions (use Zendesk Talk)
Full multi-channel email and LinkedIn sequences (use Outreach for complete platform)
best_when: A remote or hybrid SDR team wants AI parallel dialing with real-time call coaching, virtual sales floor presence, and call quality analytics to maximize outbound calling efficiency and rep development.
avoid_when: You need inbound call routing, customer support, or prefer in-person sales floor environment over virtual collaboration.

auth.notes: API key from Nooks account. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for call events and session updates. Salesforce and HubSpot integrations via native connectors. No OAuth2. Real-time dialing is browser-based app — API manages data and configuration.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user subscription; contact sales for pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2020. Raised $22M Series A (2023). Backed by a16z. Virtual sales floor differentiator — Zoom-like persistent rooms for sales team collaboration while dialing. AI Battle Cards: real-time competitive suggestions during calls. Parallel dialing with AI voicemail detection. Strong product-led growth with SDR communities.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for call sessions, analytics, and rep performance data. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. Real-time dialing is browser/app-based — API manages data, not live calls. Webhook for call events. AI coaching scores available after call completion. Virtual sales floor is browser-based.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Call session reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Rep performance reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: TCPA compliance required for parallel dialing automation
Real-time features (virtual sales floor, live AI coaching) are browser-app only
Call recordings require consent laws compliance by state/country
AI battle cards require competitive content configuration in admin
Annual contract — validate before building API integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. TCPA and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Call recordings are sensitive — implement access controls and retention policies. TCPA parallel dialing regulations require compliance review. Real-time AI coaching data requires appropriate employee consent. a16z backing brings investor security expectations.
